enableStaffChat.description: Enables or disables the entire Staff Chat module.

staffChatFormat.description: The format for messages in staff chat. %s is for the player's name, the second %s is for the message.

enableStaffBossBar.description: Shows a boss bar at the top of the screen when a staff member has staff chat toggled on.

enablePrivateMessages.description: Enables or disables private messages via /msg and /reply.

privateMessageToFormat.description: Format for private message feedback to the sender. First %s is target player name, second %s is the message.

privateMessageFromFormat.description: Format for private message received by target. First %s is sender player name, second %s is the message.

enableGroupChat.description: Enables or disables the Group Chat feature and its commands.

enableJoinLeaveMessages.description: Enables or disables custom join and leave messages.

joinMessageFormat.description: The format for join messages. Placeholders: {player_name}, {player_uuid}, {player_level}, {player_health}, {max_player_health}.

leaveMessageFormat.description: The format for leave messages. Placeholders: {player_name}, {player_uuid}, {player_level}, {player_health}, {max_player_health}.

enableFirstJoinMessage.description: Enables a special message for a player's very first join.

firstJoinMessageFormat.description: The format for the first join message. Same placeholders as regular join.
firstJoinMessageFormat.value: &dWelcome, {player_name}, to the server for the first time!

enableCustomChatFormat.description: Enables custom chat message formatting. When enabled, all chat messages use the customChatFormat.

customChatFormat.description: Custom chat message format. Supports TAG formatting and placeholders: {player_name}, {player_uuid}, {player_level}, {player_prefix}, {player_suffix}, {player_group}, {player_groups}, {prefix}, {suffix}, {group}, {player_health}, {max_player_health}. Use {message} for the chat text. Note: to preserve colors from permission prefix/suffix, do not wrap {prefix}/{suffix} in an outer color tag.
